rules.name: CortexSim SIM-MP-004 — Recursive AWS Key Grep by Service Account
rules.description: Detects www-data (or other non-interactive service identities) executing a recursive filesystem search for AWS access-key patterns. Anchor: APT29 post-compromise credential harvesting.
rules.xql_query:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = PROCESS
| filter action_process_image_name in ("grep", "egrep", "rgrep")
| filter action_process_command_line contains "AKIA" or action_process_command_line contains "aws_secret_access_key"
| filter actor_effective_username in ("www-data", "nobody", "nginx", "apache")
| fields agent_hostname, actor_effective_username, action_process_image_command_line, event_timestamp

rules.name: CortexSim SIM-MP-004 — AWS CLI Invoked by Web Service Account
rules.description: Detects aws-cli execution by service identities that have no business reason to interact with cloud APIs. Pairs with CDR sts:GetCallerIdentity event for stitching.
rules.xql_query:
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = PROCESS
| filter action_process_image_name = "aws"
| filter actor_effective_username in ("www-data", "nobody", "nginx", "apache", "postgres")
| fields agent_hostname, actor_effective_username, action_process_image_command_line, causality_actor_process_image_name, event_timestamp
